description: KrakenD is an API gateway product offered in open-source, enterprise, and AI gateway editions. It is used to configure, route, secure, and transform API and AI/LLM traffic, including exposing existing APIs as MCP tools within customer-managed deployments.
summary: KrakenD exposes a public `krakend` CLI and documentation for generating/importing OpenAPI specs and AI/MCP capabilities, but no hosted public API, GraphQL endpoint, or MCP connect endpoint on `krakend.io` itself was documented.
